repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current repair for ca6k_00282 shows a conflict warning for Ca6k00282CustomTilingData. Entries ca6k_00045 (193e1ac4) and ca6k_00227 (a6bc156b) directly address redefinition issues in op_proto.h or class definitions, which are analogous to this tiling struct conflict. Entries ca6k_00188 (84bb2c98) and ca6k_00262 (1cb26d2c) deal with missing setter methods in TilingData, a common pitfall when handling tiling structs. Entry ca6k_00257 (d6e3247f) covers a kernel-level cast error that could cause the reported correctness failure. All are from the same torch#1 category and provide complementary guidance.
